Our Philosophy

History is not a museum.
It is a wardrobe.

ERAZ was born from a single obsession: that every human age left behind not just ruins and relics, but a visual language — symbols, patterns, textures — that still pulse with meaning today.

We take those languages — the petroglyphs of the Stone Age, the geometric precision of ancient civilisations, the intricacy of medieval heraldry — and weave them into contemporary garments meant to be worn, lived in, and passed down.

Read Our Story

The Craft

How History Becomes Fashion

I
📜

Archive Research

Our designers study primary historical sources — museum archives, archaeological records, ancient artefacts.

II
✏️

Pattern Translation

Ancient symbols and motifs are hand-drawn, reinterpreted, and adapted for modern fabric and silhouette.

III
🧵

Ethical Craft

Every garment is crafted with care — using sustainable fabrics that honour the traditions they represent.

IV
📦

Delivered With Story

Each piece arrives with a card detailing the era that inspired it — so you know what you're wearing.

Who We Are

Our Story

The Beginning

Born from an obsession with time.

ERAZ did not begin in a design studio or a boardroom. It began with a question asked late at night, staring at images of cave paintings in Altamira — what if we still wore these stories?

Every civilisation that ever existed left behind a visual language. Symbols carved into rock. Geometric patterns beaten into bronze. Laurel wreaths pressed into marble. Heraldic crests stitched into banners. These were not just decorations — they were identity. They said: I was here. This is what I believed. This is what I fought for.

ERAZ is our answer to that question. We are a clothing brand built on the conviction that history's visual languages are too powerful, too beautiful, and too human to be left in museums.

"Every piece we make is a translation. We take something ancient and ask: what does it mean to wear this today?"

The Philosophy

History is not a museum. It is a wardrobe.

We believe clothing is the most personal archive a human being can carry. What you wear tells the story of who you are, where you come from, and what you value. ERAZ exists to make that story richer — to connect you, through cloth and thread, to the thousands of years of human creativity that came before you.

We are not a nostalgia brand. We are not a heritage brand in the traditional sense. We are a translation studio — taking the visual vocabulary of ancient civilisations and building it into garments that belong in the present moment, on the streets of Lahore, Karachi, and Islamabad.

Our Values

What we stand for.

📜

Authenticity

Every motif is researched. Every pattern is sourced from real historical records, not invented aesthetics.

🧵

Craft

We refuse shortcuts. Every garment is made to be worn, washed, and passed down — not discarded after a season.

🌍

Belonging

History belongs to everyone. Our collections draw from civilisations across every continent and culture.

Ready to wear history?

Browse our collections and find the era that speaks to you.

ERAZ

Clothing inspired by the ages of human history.

Customer Care

Refund Policy

At ERAZ, we stand behind every piece we make. If something isn't right, we will make it right — because history deserves to be worn with confidence.

Returns & Exchanges

We accept returns and exchanges within 14 days of delivery, provided the item is unused, unwashed, and in its original packaging with all tags intact.

  • Items must be in original, unaltered condition.
  • Sale items and limited-edition pieces are final sale and not eligible for return.
  • Customised or personalised pieces cannot be returned unless defective.
  • Free exchanges are available for size issues on your first order.

How to Initiate a Return

To start a return or exchange, reach out to us within 14 days of receiving your order:

  • WhatsApp us at +92 304 8158500 with your order details and reason for return.
  • Include photos of the item if reporting a defect or damage.
  • Our team will respond within 24–48 hours with return instructions.
  • Do not ship items back without prior confirmation from our team.

Refunds

Once we receive and inspect the returned item, we will process your refund within 5–7 business days.

  • Refunds are issued to the original payment method (bank transfer, Easypaisa, JazzCash).
  • Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or a defective item.
  • Cash on delivery orders will receive refunds via bank transfer or mobile wallet.

Defective or Wrong Items

If you receive a defective, damaged, or incorrect item, we will replace it or issue a full refund at no cost to you. Please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photographic evidence.

We take quality seriously. Every garment is inspected before dispatch — but if we missed something, that is on us and we will fix it.

Shipping Returns

  • Customers are responsible for return shipping costs unless the item is defective or incorrect.
  • We recommend using a trackable courier service.
  • ERAZ is not responsible for items lost during return shipping.

Questions? We're Here.

WhatsApp: +92 304 8158500

Instagram: @eraz.originals

Facebook: Eraz Wear

Response time: 24–48 hours

Find Your Fit

Size Chart

All measurements are in inches. Measurements may vary slightly by ±0.5 inch.

💡 Our Fit Philosophy

Sizes of ERAZ clothes are given in the size chart and they are normal, real sizes — so you won't face any issue. If you want a customised size, follow the instructions below and WhatsApp us.

T-Shirts & Oversized Tees

Size Chest (Inches) Length (Inches) Shoulder (Inches) Sleeve (Inches)
S2327209
M2328209.5
L2429229.5
XL25302310

Hoodies & Sweatshirts

Size Chest (cm) Length (cm) Shoulder (cm) Sleeve (cm)
XS90–94644458
S94–98674660
M98–104704962
L104–110735264
XL110–118765566
XXL118–126795868

How to Measure Yourself

📏

Chest

Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape parallel to the ground.

📐

Length

Measure from the highest point of your shoulder straight down to where you want the garment to end.

🦾

Sleeve

Measure from the shoulder seam down to your wrist with your arm slightly bent.

Still unsure about sizing? Message us on WhatsApp and we'll help you find the right fit.

Ask About Sizing
